onset.Description: Onset of the event in seconds

duration.Description: Duration of the event in seconds

trial_type.Description: Which food attribute the participant categorised the food on

Levels.blockStart: Start of block: begin block screen displayed
Levels.trialStart: Start of trial: fixation cross displayed
Levels.choicePhaseStart: Choice screen (response mapping & choice prompt) displayed
Levels.blockEnd: End of block: break screen displayed

trial_total.Description: Trial number across the whole session (1-360)

food_image_path.Description: Stim path to the food image file

button_position.Description: Mapping showing which of left/right keypress corresponds to yes/no

Levels.YN: Left key = yes, right key = no
Levels.NY: Left key = no, right key = yes

resp_too_slow.Description: Whether the response exceeded 5 sec (0 = did not exceed, 1 = exceeded)

sample.Description: The sample within the EEG data at which the event occurred (1-based)
